hooks.name: check-careful
hooks.description: Blocks destructive shell commands until the agent gets explicit confirmation.

hooks.name: check-freeze
hooks.description: Prevents edits outside the active freeze directory.

hooks.name: log-file-change
hooks.description: Records file edits into the daily log.

hooks.name: reinject-context
hooks.description: Injects a compact project snapshot at session start.

args: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; nvm use 24 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; nvm use 24 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; npx -y @mauricio.wolff/mcp-obsidian@latest "/path/to/your/local/repo"
source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; nvm use 24 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; npx -y mcp-gemini-cli --allow-npx
source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; nvm use 24 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; codex mcp-server
source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; nvm use 24 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; npx -y rag-memory-epf-mcp@latest
